name: Partially my fault for not wearing PPE during chem exposure—still eligible?
description: Yes, no-fault covers unless willful misconduct.

mainEntity.name: Partially my fault for not wearing PPE during chem exposure—still eligible?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, no-fault covers unless willful misconduct.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, workers' comp ignores your fault unless 100% willful misconduct.** Minor PPE lapses don't bar claims in Utah.[6] Key factors: employer duty to provide/train regardless. Document provided gear; intoxication rare bar. Claims proceed normally.
